actionUnits.condition: Manual invocation of ToggleVisibility.Toggle on MonoBehaviour id 1963046888 (guid: 064216bc04beaca4fab9a6b5d9bca977). No m_Calls configured in scene; object lacks Rigidbody/Collider/EventTrigger, so this won't trigger automatically. Expected behavior: toggles Renderer.enabled on the same GameObject; if no Renderer is present (likely for a Canvas), this may raise a NullReferenceException, which should be captured for robustness testing.
